query:
-- Test the LIKE filter directly
SELECT COUNT(*) as matched_sasboss
FROM services
WHERE status != 'terminated'
  AND billingPlatform LIKE '%SasBoss%';

-- Check exact billingPlatform value
SELECT DISTINCT billingPlatform 
FROM services 
WHERE billingPlatform IS NOT NULL 
  AND billingPlatform != ''
LIMIT 10;
